stamp.title: US 1c Franklin, Continental Bank Note Printing
stamp.summary: 1873 issue with the Continental Bank Note Co. secret mark: a small dash or crescent added in the small pearl to the left of the 'O' in 'ONE'. This example shows a bright blue shade and very good centering. Unused.

stamp.title: US 1c Franklin, National Bank Note Printing
stamp.summary: 1870 issue by National Bank Note Co., lacks the secret mark in the pearl at the left of the 'O' in 'ONE'. This example shows a slightly duller blue shade compared to the Continental printing. Centering is Fine-Very Fine, shifted toward the bottom right corner.
